corporate.title: At Las Mañanitas for corporate events
corporate.name: Corporate Events
corporate.description: We have designed a proposal aimed at providing your team with a productive, comfortable, and memorable experience. We combine our renowned service, exclusive spaces, and the tranquility of Cuernavaca so that every detail flows seamlessly, allowing your team to fully focus on achieving its objectives.

social.title: Las Mañanitas, an unforgettable experience.
social.name: Social Events
social.description: At Las Mañanitas Casanueva, we offer the ideal setting to bring that unforgettable experience you have always dreamed of to life. A place where you will enjoy personalized attention and unparalleled quality that distinguishes us. At Salón Casanueva, we feature a beautiful covered terrace and a colonial-style dome with elegant décor, along with a spacious garden filled with stunning fountains and exotic birds that create a unique and vibrant atmosphere for your event. Enjoy our exquisite cuisine, ranging from traditional Mexican classics to refined international dishes.

card1: Venue capacity for up to 600 guests
Catering service at the location of your choice
Venue for religious and civil ceremonies
High-end cuisine (internationally recognized for quality and variety)

header.title: Spa Orlane Paris by Las Mañanitas Regulations
header.subtitle: Operating hours: From 08:00 to 20:00 hrs.
header.description: To enjoy a unique experience in our SPA, please take the following rules into account:

rules.1: All SPA treatments are unisex and are available for both hotel guests and external clients.
rules.2: Couples (man and woman) are not allowed to enter the hydrothermal circuit, as there are separate areas for men and women.
rules.3: A prior reservation is mandatory and subject to availability.
rules.5: SPA services for pregnant women are subject to conditions. (Consult your doctor).
rules.6: It is mandatory to complete a clinical form indicating your health conditions, which must be filled out before accessing any SPA service.
rules.7: It is the client's responsibility to inform the SPA reception of any important changes.
rules.8: In case of delay to the treatment by the client, the establishment may limit its duration based on other existing appointments.
rules.9: The SPA provides clients with a locker key, where they will find a basket for belongings, slippers, a towel, and hangers for clothing. The key must be returned to the SPA reception upon leaving the facilities.
rules.10: The materials used during treatments are for internal use only and must be returned to the SPA.
rules.11: Entry is prohibited for individuals in an improper condition.
rules.12: The consumption or introduction of food, alcoholic beverages, or other substances not provided by our establishments is prohibited.
rules.13: The SPA is not responsible, civilly or criminally, for damages suffered by the client as a result of improper use of the facilities/equipment or for loss, theft, and/or damage of personal belongings.
rules.14: We recommend our clients remove all jewelry before any treatment.
rules.15: One of the characteristics of the SPA is its calm, quiet, and serene atmosphere; therefore, we ask our clients to maintain a respectful attitude to ensure a proper environment.
rules.16: Bringing food and drinks into the pool area is prohibited.
rules.17: You must shower before using any facility.
rules.18: Use of the pool is at the user's own risk.
rules.19: Smoking inside the SPA facilities is strictly prohibited.
rules.20: For health reasons, no more than 15 minutes is recommended in the jacuzzi, steam room, and sauna.
rules.21: For health and safety reasons, treatments cannot be provided under the influence of alcohol or drugs.
rules.22: For your safety, walking barefoot inside the SPA facilities is not allowed.
rules.23: Wearing a swimsuit is mandatory in wet areas.
rules.24: Please do not use body products in the jacuzzi, steam room, sauna, or pool.
rules.25: Use of the jacuzzi, sauna, or steam room is strictly prohibited for individuals with contagious diseases or open wounds.
rules.26: The SPA manager has the authority to deny access to the facilities to individuals who do not comply with these regulations or who, in their judgment, may pose a risk.
rules.27: The use of speakers or any device to play music is not allowed.
rules.28: Use headphones or keep music volume very low in the pool area.

footer: Please leave your personal belongings in the safety box in your room and/or locker. Keep the key with you at all times. The SPA and the hotel are not responsible for forgotten or lost items.
If no discomfort is reported to the therapist during the session, it will be understood that everything was satisfactory and the full charge for your treatment will be applied.
The treatment/massage you received is strictly professional. Any inappropriate behavior will result in termination of the session and removal from the facilities with full charge applied.
Please leave your personal belongings in the safety box in your room and/or locker. Keep the key with you at all times. The SPA and the hotel are not responsible for forgotten or lost items.
spa_rules.contact_note: If you have any questions, please contact extension 207 and we will be happy to assist you.

spa_aesthetic.title: Spa Orlane Aesthetics
spa_aesthetic.spa_footer_note: Prices in national currency, VAT Included

spa_loyalty.title: Spa Orlane
spa_loyalty.description: At Spa Orlane, we appreciate your preference through our Loyalty Program, designed to pamper our guests and frequent clients with exclusive benefits, special experiences, and complimentary treatments. Our goal is to recognize your loyalty and make every visit even more special.
spa_loyalty.subtitle: During the month, each visit to the spa accumulates special benefits:

benefits.2: 3rd visit: Welcome reception with a special courtesy amenity.
benefits.3: 4th visit: Enjoy a complimentary 50-minute treatment, to choose from our available service selection.

participation.title: Participation Requirements
participation.1: Must have received an official invitation from Spa Orlane.
participation.2: Applies only to treatments carried out within the same month.

conditions.title: Program Conditions
conditions.0: Visits must be made within the same calendar month.
conditions.1: At the end of the month or upon reaching the 4th visit, the count resets automatically.
conditions.2: Benefits are non-transferable and cannot be combined with other promotions.
conditions.3: Benefits are subject to availability and prior reservation.

offers.card_subtitle1: Fourth night complimentary. Enjoy a longer stay in this paradise by receiving your fourth night free.
offers.card_subtitle2: Stay 7 nights for the price of 5. Book a 7-night stay and enjoy the added benefit of the sixth and seventh nights complimentary.

experiences.card_title1: Enjoy a unique stay in this incomparable paradise

unique_stay.title: Enjoy a unique stay in this incomparable paradise
unique_stay.description: Start your experience with a warm breakfast, enjoy the most revitalizing sensation in our spa, and finish with a restful stay in any of our luxury suites. This experience for two includes: one night in the selected room, a $400 MXN breakfast credit, a 50-minute massage, and a relaxing hydrothermal circuit at Spa Orlane Paris.

two_experience.title: An experience for two
two_experience.description: Enjoy an unforgettable stay as a couple at Las Mañanitas Hotel. Our romantic experience includes: one night in a luxury suite with romantic decoration, a bottle of French wine Chateaux Bernot, a cheese board, a $400 MXN breakfast credit, ending with a relaxing hydrothermal circuit at Spa Orlane Paris.

picnic_day.title: Picnic Day at Las Mañanitas
picnic_day.description:
Enjoy nature in a perfect setting for two with our special picnic experiences.

Option 1 (for 2 people)
Cheese platter - Baguette / Panini / Croissant (choose 2 options) - Fresh fruit (2 options) - 355 ml house red wine - water - board game.

Option 2 (for 2 people)
Cheese and cold cuts platter - Baguette / Panini / Croissant (choose 2 options) - Fresh fruit (2 options) - Sweet snacks (2 per person) - 200 ml Moët & Chandon - water - ceramic painting set (gift) - board game.

seasonal_offer.title: Seasonal Special Offer
seasonal_offer.description:
UP TO 35% OFF. Enjoy your vacation at an exclusive rate by booking directly with us.

Promotion subject to availability / restrictions apply / cannot be combined with other offers.

palacio_cortes.name: Palacio de Cortés
palacio_cortes.description: A historic monument commissioned by Hernán Cortés during the years following the Conquest of Mexico, built on the remains of the ceremonial and tribute center dedicated to Tláhuac known as Tlatlocayacalli. It is currently the Cuauhnáhuac Regional Museum.

catedral_cuernavaca.name: Cuernavaca Cathedral
catedral_cuernavaca.description: A 16th-century building, making it one of the oldest cathedrals in the country and the fifth Franciscan foundation in Mexico. It was established in 1525 by the first twelve Franciscan friars who arrived in the country, with the support of a newly arrived group from Spain.

jardin_borda.name: Jardín Borda
jardin_borda.description: A historic museum located in what was once the summer residence of wealthy miner José de la Borda from Taxco. Its beautiful gardens, baroque fountains, and wide walkways surrounded by lush trees create a unique setting. Within the garden, there is a lake with small boats, as well as a museum where handicrafts can be found.

museo_robert_brady.name: Robert Brady Museum
museo_robert_brady.description: Former residence of Robert Brady, an American collector who decorated his home with a collection of over 1,300 art pieces, including paintings, sculptures, prints, and handicrafts from around the world. Among the highlights are works by Rufino Tamayo, Frida Kahlo, Diego Rivera, María Izquierdo, Miguel Covarrubias, and many others.

tour_tepoztlan.name: Tepoztlán Tour
tour_tepoztlan.description:
5-hour visit and tour of the town of Tepoztlán. It is considered one of the 15 most beautiful places in the country, known for its mystical atmosphere, legends, and traditions still preserved by its inhabitants. Its spectacular mountains will captivate you.

Hike up Tepozteco Hill to visit the pyramid dedicated to Ometochtli Tepoztecátl, the god of pulque, where you can enjoy a breathtaking panoramic view. After descending, the tour continues to the Ex-Convent of the Nativity, built by the indigenous people of Tepoztlán and known for its beautiful geometric decorations on ceilings and corridors. The tour includes a visit to the artisan market and concludes at a restaurant where you can enjoy traditional Mexican cuisine.

tour_xochicalco.name: Xochicalco Tour
tour_xochicalco.description:
4–6 hour visit and tour of the archaeological site. Xochicalco is located in the municipality of Miacatlán in the state of Morelos, Mexico. It was declared a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 1999.

The archaeological zone includes the main plaza, which houses a shrine and the Great Pyramid; La Malinche, where 20 circular altars are located; the palace; and the southern ball court. The main plaza is the most important space in this sacred city, as it features the Pyramid of the Feathered Serpent. There is also a museum with a collection of archaeological objects discovered in the area, including ceramics and sculptures.

tour_taxco.name: Taxco City Tour
tour_taxco.description:
4–6 hour visit and tour. The tour begins with a visit to a silver workshop, where you will receive an introduction to the different processes used to work silver, inside a simulated mine.

Afterward, we visit the beautiful Parish of Santa Prisca, built in the 16th century, a remarkable example of New Spanish Baroque art. You will have free time to explore and enjoy this colonial city, starting at the main square, continuing through artisan areas and silver museums.

For lunch, you will have time to visit a traditional restaurant in Taxco.

tour_grutas.name: Cacahuamilpa Caves
tour_grutas.description:
4–6 hour visit and tour of the caves. These majestic caves are located in the Sierra Madre del Sur, spanning parts of the states of Guerrero and Morelos.

Inside, the caves contain an enormous variety of fascinating rock formations that spark the imagination of visitors. The site also features underground rivers that can be explored if desired. More than 90 chambers are open to the public and can be toured in approximately 2 hours. The walk, about 2 kilometers long, is highly rewarding, with guides sharing details and stories that enrich the experience.

tour_casaresiu.name: Casa Resiú Nayaá Tour
tour_casaresiu.description:
The largest mezcal distillery in Mexico. Experience a tour designed to explore the origin and production process of the finest artisanal mezcal.

Agave piñas are ground using a stone tahona, and the extracted nectar is fermented in wooden vats and double distilled in copper stills, all under the care of master mezcal artisans.

• 2-hour guided tour through agave fields.
• Guided visit of the distillery.
• Mexican snacks.
• Special tasting of up to 4 varieties: Aromas de Guerrero, Weber, Cupreata, and Criollo.
• 100% cacao chocolate tasting.
• Bottle of Criollo mezcal (50 ml).

restaurant.title: Our Service
restaurant.name: Las Mañanitas Restaurant
restaurant.description:
Welcome to our restaurant, where culinary excellence blends with a unique dining experience. Every moment of the day is an opportunity to explore a menu that embraces the best of local, national, and international cuisine.

Our outstanding cuisine has been internationally recognized.

atrio.title: Exclusive venue for private events at Las Mañanitas.
atrio.name: Atrio
atrio.description: This intimate venue for banquets of up to 50 guests preserves the elegance and colonial charm that distinguishes our hotel, offering a warm and sophisticated atmosphere. With architectural details that evoke Mexican heritage and décor that blends contemporary touches with classic elements, Atrio is ideal for special celebrations, private gatherings, or any event of your choice. It will be a pleasure to share this new concept with you.

bar.title: Open-air bar at Las Mañanitas.
bar.name: Azalea Bar
bar.description: Azalea, our open-air bar, takes its name from the flowers that beautify our gardens. In this space, tradition is reflected in a selection of classic beverages, served in a natural setting that invites you to relax and enjoy in harmony with the environment that defines us.

room.title: Room service at Las Mañanitas.
room.name: Room Service
room.description: Enjoy our variety of food options available through our room service.
